name: Dharmik Sheth
summary: Motivated and detail-oriented Quality Assurance (QA) professional currently in the final semester of B.Sc. (IT), with hands-on experience gained through a QA internship at Curebits Techlabs. Strong foundation in manual testing, including test case design and defect tracking, along with growing proficiency in automation testing using Python and Selenium. Committed to delivering high-quality software and continuously enhancing testing expertise.

points: Conducting manual testing of web applications to validate features and user workflows.
Creating and executing detailed test cases and test scenarios.
Reporting and tracking defects with proper documentation and severity levels.
Collaborating with developers to ensure product quality.
Working closely with development teams to ensure timely bug resolution Building foundational skills in automation testing using Python and Selenium

projects.name: Phone Box - E-Commerce Web Application
projects.desc: Academic project for a web-based mobile phone shopping system.
points: Designed and developed user login and registration system.
Implemented Add to Cart and Buy Now functionality.
Created CRUD operations for products, users, cart, and orders.
Performed manual testing using test cases for login, cart, and booking modules.
projects.tech: HTML, CSS, PHP, MySQL; Tools: XAMPP / WAMP
